title: cuphea campylocentra
intro: Cuphea campylocentra, also known as firecracker plant, is a tropical flowering plant species belonging to the family Lythraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cuphea campylocentra include relieving congestion and soothing sore throats, while also possessing antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Cuphea campylocentra can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate cold and flu symptoms.
